rulings.Case Title: PERRY VS RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN, INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Judgment By Defendant International Truck And Engin Corp.
rulings.Rulings: DENY AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2, & 4. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE/CAUSATION. GRANT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3. DEFENDANT NOT MANUFACTURER OF FRICTION PRODUCT AND THEORY INAPPLICABLE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CAN IDENTIFY DEFENDANT. (PB)

rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO AMEND ANSWER GRANTED - GOOD CAUSE PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFFS ANSWERS TO DEPOSITION. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL DISCOVERY DENIED. (JH)
